task_completion.description: Verify the survey is created with the correct title.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a survey titled 'Springfield 2026 Budget Consultation' in the LimeSurvey dashboard or survey settings.

task_completion.description: Verify the 'Budget Allocation' question group is created.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a question group named 'Budget Allocation' within the survey structure.

task_completion.description: Verify the 'BUDGET' question is created with the correct type and text.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a question with the code 'BUDGET', type 'Multiple Numerical Input', and text 'Please allocate 100% of the discretionary budget across these sectors:'.

task_completion.description: Verify the sub-questions, slider layout, and sum validation for the BUDGET question.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for sub-questions with codes SAFE, INFRA, PARK, HLTH, and GOV. In the display/logic settings for the BUDGET question, verify 'Slider layout' is enabled and 'Equals sum value' is set to 100.

task_completion.description: Verify the 'REASON' question is created with the correct type and text.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a question with the code 'REASON', type 'Long free text', and text 'Please explain your focus on Infrastructure.'.

task_completion.description: Verify the conditional logic (relevance equation) for the REASON question.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a relevance equation or condition on the REASON question that checks if the INFRA allocation is greater than 40 (e.g., BUDGET_INFRA > 40).

task_completion.description: Verify the survey has been activated.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a status indicator showing the survey is 'Active' or a success message confirming the survey activation.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the web GUI to create the survey.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the LimeSurvey web interface in a browser, not terminal commands or API scripts.

integrity.description: Verify the agent actually navigated through the creation steps.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show intermediate steps like adding questions, editing sub-questions, and configuring logic, rather than just a final completed screen.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not just paste the entire prompt into a single text field.
integrity.visual_evidence: The text fields (Title, Question text, Relevance equation) should contain only the specific required strings, not the full task instructions.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The survey must be titled 'Springfield 2026 Budget Consultation' with a question group 'Budget Allocation'. The primary question (Code: BUDGET) must be a Multiple Numerical Input with sub-questions SAFE, INFRA, PARK, HLTH, and GOV. It must use a slider layout and enforce a sum of exactly 100. The secondary question (Code: REASON) must be a Long free text question that is conditionally visible only when INFRA > 40. The survey must be activated at the end.
